# This test exercises MMA behavior at low write bandwidth with the
# significance floor. With 500 ranges across 6 nodes under a write-only
# workload, mean WB per store is ~333 KB/s, well below the 2 MiB/s
# significance floor. The skewed initial placement creates large enough
# imbalances that the most loaded stores exceed the 10% overloadSlow
# threshold (relative to the 2 MiB floor), triggering WB-based rebalancing.
#
# MMA sheds replicas from overloaded stores until fractionAbove drops below
# the threshold. Because the floor is larger than the mean, the residual
# imbalance at convergence is wider than it would be without the floor:
# stores settle within ~210 KB/s of the mean (10% of 2 MiB) rather than
# within 10% of the mean itself. This is the intended tradeoff -- the floor
# prevents churn from tiny absolute differences at the cost of looser
# balancing at low throughput.
#
# See: https://github.com/cockroachdb/cockroach/issues/164539
#
# Setup:
#   - 6 nodes, 500 ranges with skewed initial placement
#   - Write-only uniform workload, mean WB ≈ 333 KB/s per store
#   - Per-range WB ≈ 4 KB/s
gen_cluster nodes=6 node_cpu_cores=8
----

gen_ranges ranges=500 placement_type=skewed
----

gen_load rate=2000 rw_ratio=0 min_block=1000 max_block=1000 raft_cpu_per_write=1
----
0.00 raft-vcpus, 1.9 MiB/s goodput

setting split_queue_enabled=false
----

eval duration=25m cfgs=(mma-only,mma-count) metrics=(write_bytes_per_second,replicas,cpu)
----
mma-only:
cpu#1: last:  [s1=1205, s2=1197, s3=1144, s4=1044, s5=771, s6=631] (stddev=220.64, mean=998.67, sum=5992)
cpu#1: thrash_pct: [s1=20%, s2=11%, s3=16%, s4=9%, s5=17%, s6=12%]  (sum=84%)
replicas#1: first: [s1=500, s2=433, s3=243, s4=148, s5=100, s6=76] (stddev=162.90, mean=250.00, sum=1500)
replicas#1: last:  [s1=302, s2=300, s3=286, s4=261, s5=193, s6=158] (stddev=55.28, mean=250.00, sum=1500)
replicas#1: thrash_pct: [s1=0%, s2=0%, s3=0%, s4=0%, s5=0%, s6=0%]  (sum=0%)
write_bytes_per_second#1: last:  [s1=1205555, s2=1197359, s3=1144643, s4=1044400, s5=771814, s6=631881] (stddev=220481.93, mean=999275.33, sum=5995652)
write_bytes_per_second#1: thrash_pct: [s1=14%, s2=11%, s3=16%, s4=12%, s5=14%, s6=15%]  (sum=82%)
hash: 8faf1610602e73c6
==========================

replicas#1: last:  [s1=261, s2=257, s3=253, s4=245, s5=242, s6=242] (stddev=7.44, mean=250.00, sum=1500)

write_bytes_per_second#1: thrash_pct: [s1=53%, s2=53%, s3=52%, s4=33%, s5=38%, s6=32%]  (sum=259%)
hash: 6bb61ed0796c33e7
==========================
